description: Read-first Apache Airflow operations CLI for DAG inventory, DAG run history, task instance inspection, pool capacity, metadata sync, search, and runtime health checks.

novel_features.name: Airflow health readout
novel_features.description: Checks Airflow's health endpoint so an engineer can verify the webserver, scheduler, and supporting services before drilling into DAG failures.

novel_features.name: DAG inventory
novel_features.description: Lists DAG metadata such as active and paused state, giving teams a compact view of what Airflow is currently managing.

novel_features.name: DAG run triage
novel_features.description: Filters DAG run history by state and time window to help identify failed or delayed pipeline runs.

novel_features.name: Task instance inspection
novel_features.description: Shows task-level state, retries, and timing inside a DAG run so engineers can find the failing step.

novel_features.name: Local Airflow metadata search
novel_features.description: Syncs Airflow metadata into a local SQLite store for fast offline search and lightweight analysis.
